old_value: {"id":"beads-at4.6","title":"types-js: migrate interfaces to Zod schemas","description":"Install zod 4.1+. Split src/index.ts into domain schema files (common.ts, users.ts, servers.ts, files.ts, messages.ts, keys.ts). Migrate all interfaces to z.object() with z.infer\u003ctypeof\u003e type exports. Use as-const objects for enums (TokenScopes, SocketAuthErrors, MailType). Add hexBytes() codec for wire binary fields. Fix ISucessMsg→ISuccessMsg typo. Add TSDoc + .describe() to all schemas. Keep same exported type names for backward compat.","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"feature","owner":"33427880+dream9x@users.noreply.github.com","created_at":"2026-04-08T17:58:14Z","created_by":"Dream","updated_at":"2026-04-08T17:58:14Z"}

{"description":"Create packages/eslint-config with base.ts exporting shared config (strictTypeChecked, perfectionist with import grouping, prettier). Each app/package gets its own eslint.config.ts importing the base. Desktop adds svelte plugin + svelte framework group. Mobile adds react + react-hooks + react framework group. Store/UI use base only. ALSO: ban direct imports from @vex-chat/types and @vex-chat/crypto in app code — apps should only import from @vex-chat/libvex or @vex-chat/store. Use no-restricted-imports to enforce."}
